name: part_007
file: tmp_【 3DLIVE 】#アキロゼ生誕祭2026 ーLife is GAMEー【ホロライブ⧸アキ・ローゼンタール】 [_tBlI-l8WLk]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_007.webm

scenes.description: A cinematic drama segment where Aki Rosenthal finds a mysterious coin and is instructed to sit in a cage.
A transition sequence featuring a roulette wheel and a board game path, leading to a countdown for the next performance.
Performance of the song 'Whisper Whisper Whisper'.

subtitles.original: このコインは…
subtitles.english: This coin is...

subtitles.original: はは。そうか。君はそっちなんだね。
subtitles.english: Haha. I see. You're on that side, then.

subtitles.original: そっち？
subtitles.english: That side?

subtitles.original: ここに座って。
subtitles.english: Sit here.

subtitles.original: え…
subtitles.english: Uh...

subtitles.original: この後は…君次第だよ。
subtitles.english: After this... it's up to you.

subtitles.original:
Whisper Whisper Whisper
作詞・作曲：Azari
subtitles.english:
Whisper Whisper Whisper
Lyrics & Composition: Azari

subtitles.original: 忘れられないのはこの目のせい
subtitles.english: The reason I can't forget is because of these eyes

subtitles.original: 赤く残る過ち　甘噛みの跡
subtitles.english: Errors remaining in red, marks of a light bite

subtitles.original: 零れ出した飢えは止めどない
subtitles.english: The overflowing hunger is relentless

subtitles.original: 誰もいない間に悪魔を探す
subtitles.english: Searching for the devil while no one is around

subtitles.original: 作り笑いはこの耳のせい
subtitles.english: The fake smile is because of these ears

subtitles.original: 深い壁の中から呼びかける声
subtitles.english: A voice calling out from within deep walls

subtitles.original: Whisper Whisper Whisper　まだ触らせない
subtitles.english: Whisper Whisper Whisper, I won't let you touch yet

subtitles.original: この檻を抜け出して悪魔を駆ける
subtitles.english: Escaping this cage and running with the devil

subtitles.original: 鏡の前でこの口のせい
subtitles.english: In front of the mirror, because of this mouth

subtitles.original: 伝えたい言葉さえ噛み殺す夜
subtitles.english: A night where even the words I want to say are bitten back

subtitles.original: Whisper Whisper Whisper　まだ打ち明けない
subtitles.english: Whisper Whisper Whisper, I won't reveal it yet

subtitles.original: 神様を裏切って悪魔と過ごす
subtitles.english: Betraying God and spending time with the devil

subtitles.original: 曖昧に夢見ていたいあなたに
subtitles.english: To you who wants to dream vaguely

subtitles.original: そっと気づかせてあげたいだけ
subtitles.english: I just want to gently make you notice

subtitles.original: おおあなたにも　おおあなたにも　おおあなたにも
subtitles.english: Oh, to you too... oh, to you too... oh, to you too...

subtitles.original: 消えない傷を隠したいあなたに
subtitles.english: To you who wants to hide wounds that won't fade

subtitles.original: そっと悩ませてあげたいだけ
subtitles.english: I just want to gently make you worry

subtitles.original: おおあなたにも　おおあなたにも　悪魔を探す
subtitles.english: Oh, to you too... oh, to you too... searching for the devil

subtitles.original: 作り笑いはこの耳のせい
subtitles.english: The fake smile is because of these ears

subtitles.original: 深い壁の中から呼びかける声
subtitles.english: A voice calling out from within deep walls

subtitles.original: Whisper Whisper Whisper　まだ触らせない
subtitles.english: Whisper Whisper Whisper, I won't let you touch yet

subtitles.original: この檻を抜け出して悪魔を駆ける
subtitles.english: Escaping this cage and running with the devil

subtitles.original: 鏡の前でこの口のせい
subtitles.english: In front of the mirror, because of this mouth

subtitles.original: 伝えたい言葉さえ噛み殺す夜
subtitles.english: A night where even the words I want to say are bitten back

subtitles.original: Whisper Whisper Whisper　まだ打ち明けない
subtitles.english: Whisper Whisper Whisper, I won't reveal it yet

subtitles.original: 神様を裏切って悪魔と過ごす
subtitles.english: Betraying God and spending time with the devil

subtitles.original:
BANG!!!
作詞：ryo (supercell) 作曲：Giga
subtitles.english:
BANG!!!
Lyrics: ryo (supercell) Composition: Giga

subtitles.original: 好き嫌い常識 I don't care ぶっ飛べバーン！
subtitles.english: Likes, dislikes, common sense, I don't care, blast off, BANG!

subtitles.original: 高値買い majority 私に負けはなし
subtitles.english: Buying at a high price, majority, I never lose

subtitles.original: ここまでって引かれた　そのボーダー誰のルール？
subtitles.english: The border drawn saying "this far"... whose rule is that?

subtitles.original: あの日乗り越えた weak point
subtitles.english: The weak point I overcame that day

subtitles.original: 強くなった私が笑い飛ばしてあげる
subtitles.english: The now-stronger me will laugh it off for you

subtitles.original: 言いたいことは言う
subtitles.english: I say what I want to say

subtitles.original: やりたくないことはしない
subtitles.english: I don't do what I don't want to do

subtitles.original: 悪意気にしない
subtitles.english: I don't care about malice

subtitles.original: みんな違うの当然だし
subtitles.english: It's natural for everyone to be different

subtitles.original: 私も変わんない　目の前の自分
subtitles.english: I won't change either, the self right in front of me

subtitles.original: Everybody say “I want to be free”
subtitles.english: Everybody say “I want to be free”

subtitles.original: お裾分けはいいな　それじゃ何も変えられんな
subtitles.english: Hand-me-downs are nice, but you can't change anything like that

subtitles.original: Everybody say “I want some more”
subtitles.english: Everybody say “I want some more”

subtitles.original: 構わない自分肯定　生きてるんだ私
subtitles.english: Self-affirmation is fine, I'm living my life

subtitles.original: ねえ生きてるんだ私
subtitles.english: Hey, I'm living my life

subtitles.original: 壊れそう…
subtitles.english: Feels like breaking...

subtitles.original: 生まれたその時から選んできたんだ
subtitles.english: I've been choosing ever since I was born

subtitles.original: 思い出せ　私は私だ
subtitles.english: Remember, I am myself

subtitles.original: 愚かな事など　何一つもない　嘘じゃない
subtitles.english: There's nothing foolish about it, it's not a lie

subtitles.original: なりたい自分に
subtitles.english: Into the self I want to be

subtitles.original: 好き嫌い常識 I don't care ぶっ飛べバーン！
subtitles.english: Likes, dislikes, common sense, I don't care, blast off, BANG!

subtitles.original: 好き嫌い常識 I don't care ぶっ飛べバーン！
subtitles.english: Likes, dislikes, common sense, I don't care, blast off, BANG!

subtitles.original: 振る手ならさ　てかこのリリック増さ
subtitles.english: If it's a waving hand... well, this lyric will increase

subtitles.original: 分からす　挑発　下向いて舌打ちからのハイ！
subtitles.english: Make them understand, provocation, look down, click your tongue, then "Hi!"

subtitles.original: Excuse me?　力ずくハイ！
subtitles.english: Excuse me? With all my might, hi!
